title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
summary: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
briefing: Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the messaging platform will roll out a native non-custodial Gram wallet this summer, bringing self-custody crypto transactions to its more than 1 billion users.

title: Crypto market breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools, analyst says
summary: Crypto market breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools, analyst says
briefing: Bitcoin topped $67,000 while crypto stocks rallied on optimism over US crypto legislation and signs investors may be rotating out of AI trades.

title: White House agrees to ethics provisions in market structure bill
summary: White House agrees to ethics provisions in market structure bill
briefing: The price of Bitcoin moved above $66,000 to reach a seven-week high on Tuesday as reports circulated of a deal with the White House to address ethics in the CLARITY Act.

title: BIS warns stablecoins could weaken capital controls in emerging markets
summary: BIS warns stablecoins could weaken capital controls in emerging markets
briefing: Researchers found dollar-backed stablecoins are less affected by capital controls than traditional bank deposits, raising new questions about monetary sovereignty in emerging markets.

title: MEXC adds Bittensor TAO staking for its global user base
summary: MEXC adds Bittensor TAO staking for its global user base
briefing: The integration with validator Yuma gives millions of MEXC users access to Bittensor, an AI-focused blockchain whose ecosystem now spans 128 specialized subnets.

title: Bitcoin nears seven-week high as stocks ignore Iran strikes, Trump 10% tariff plans
summary: Bitcoin nears seven-week high as stocks ignore Iran strikes, Trump 10% tariff plans
briefing: Bitcoin and crypto joined US stocks in brushing off US-Iran war escalation and the threat of fresh trade tariffs before the end of the month.

title: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
summary: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
briefing: The UCITS ETF, CoinShares’ first in Europe, began trading on Deutsche Börse Xetra, tracking a rules-based index of publicly listed BTC miners.

title: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
summary: Robinhood-backed DEX Arcus expands with tokenized assets, perps
briefing: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

title: Google Ships New Gemini Flash Models, But Pro Is Still Missing
summary: Google Ships New Gemini Flash Models, But Pro Is Still Missing
briefing: As Gemini 3.5 Pro stalls in testing limbo, Google ships 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a restricted cybersecurity model—and quietly teases Gemini 4.

title: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
summary: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
briefing: The Tiger Global-led round values the startup at $1 billion as it wires stablecoin rails directly into a federally chartered bank, aiming to modernize the correspondent-banking plumbing behind cross-border payments.

title: Google Is Building an AI Chip Just for Gemini—And Investors Already Moved On It
summary: Google Is Building an AI Chip Just for Gemini—And Investors Already Moved On It
briefing: Codenamed Frozen v2, Google's new server chip would bake part of Gemini's architecture directly into hardware for a projected 6–10x efficiency gain.

title: XRP Breaks Out on Clarity Act Hopes. The Charts Are Still Cautious
summary: XRP Breaks Out on Clarity Act Hopes. The Charts Are Still Cautious
briefing: The Ripple-linked token just had its best day in weeks, as Washington may finally be delivering what the XRP Army has been waiting for.

title: Jack Mallers Quits Twenty One Capital as Tether's Bitcoin Merger Collapses
summary: Jack Mallers Quits Twenty One Capital as Tether's Bitcoin Merger Collapses
briefing: XXI stock dropped nearly 18% after the company's co-founder stepped down and Tether's plan to combine three Bitcoin firms officially fell apart.

title: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
summary: Galaxy Commits Up to $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for Quantum Threat
briefing: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

title: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
summary: Morning Minute: The Clarity Act Has New Life
briefing: Odds of the Clarity Act passing in 2026 jumped to 42% after a surprising new development from the White House.

title: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
summary: Pakistan Launches Crypto Investigation Unit to Fight Money Laundering
briefing: Islamabad is building the enforcement side of its crypto push, standing up a unit to police money laundering even as it licenses exchanges.
